notes: VGZ is gzipped VGM; .vgm fixtures were derived losslessly from downloaded .vgz files to exercise raw VGM loading.
Fixtures are for local development smoke tests of native emulated music formats.
GYM fixtures from GYMX containers were normalized by inflating the zlib payload, preserving the raw GYM event stream for libgme.
VGM/VGZ fixtures were selected by opening and rendering them with libgme to avoid unsupported chip variants in smoke tests.
Future backend fixtures; not expected to play until their engines are implemented.
Companion library files are staged in the same folders when discovered.
Use for local development; review redistribution terms before public bundling.
